endpoints.name: GET /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/providers/Microsoft.Sql/locations/{locationName}/usages
endpoints.description: Gets all subscription usage metrics in a given location.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{LOCATIONNAME}} with a real locationname.

endpoints.name: GET /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/providers/Microsoft.Sql/locations/{locationName}/usages/{usageName}
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{LOCATIONNAME}} with a real locationname. Replace {{USAGENAME}} with a real usagename.
